cm.cm_applicant: Stores the list of non-Primary Dealer applicants authorized to participate in bids.
cm.cm_applicant_mapping: Stores the mapping that links each non-Primary Dealer applicant to its Primary Dealer counterparty.
cm.cm_applicant_mapping_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_applicant_mapping.
cm.cm_applicant_submission_group: Stores bulk applicant submission groups, linking each batch to its uploaded source document and tracking the overall maker-checker workflow status of the group.
cm.cm_applicant_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_applicant.
cm.cm_bank_master: Stores the master list of participating banks and financial institutions from MEPS+ daily bank list interface file (banks.txt).
cm.cm_bank_master_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_bank_master.
cm.cm_batch_job: Stores the master execution log for batch jobs within OMEGA, recording job parameters, execution timings, handlers, and final outcomes or exceptions.
cm.cm_batch_job_detail: Stores the per-record execution details of a batch job, linking the master job run to specific target records along with individual processing outcomes.
cm.cm_batch_job_detail_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_batch_job_detail.
cm.cm_corppass_role_map: Maps external Corppass digital service roles to internal OMEGA (Kaizen) roles to establish role-based access control.
cm.cm_corppass_role_map_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_corppass_role_map.
cm.cm_counterparty: Stores the configured profile details and operational roles of system counterparties.
cm.cm_counterparty_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_counterparty.
cm.cm_documents: Stores the S3 storage references and metadata for files processed by OMEGA.
cm.cm_documents_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_documents.
cm.cm_file_record_error: Stores per-record validation errors detected during processing of interface files or bulk file uploads, linked back to the parent file registry record.
cm.cm_file_record_error_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_file_record_error.
cm.cm_file_registry: Stores records for all batch files processed by OMEGA — both incoming/outgoing interface feeds (MEPS+, CDP, FMBS, etc.) and user-uploaded bulk files (bid uploads, syndication placements, etc.).
cm.cm_file_registry_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_file_registry.
cm.cm_internal_role_group: Stores the list of internal OMEGA role groups, defining the role-based permissions assignable to internal users.
cm.cm_internal_role_group_map: Maps each internal role group to one or more KAIZEN role codes.
cm.cm_internal_role_group_map_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_internal_role_group_map.
cm.cm_internal_role_group_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_internal_role_group.
cm.cm_master_code: Stores the master code keys/values/definitions used throughout the OMEGA application.
cm.cm_master_code_category: Stores the master code category headers for all master code keys under cm_master_code.
cm.cm_master_code_category_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_master_code_category.
cm.cm_master_code_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_master_code.
cm.cm_properties: Stores dynamic application configuration properties consumed by OMEGA microservices (Spring Cloud Config-style key-value store, scoped by application/profile/label).
cm.cm_properties_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_properties.
cm.cm_public_holiday: Stores the list of public holidays per country.
cm.cm_public_holiday_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_public_holiday.
cm.cm_report_metadata: Stores the metadata for system reports, including the template path, data source query and supported output formats used to generate each report.
cm.cm_report_metadata_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_report_metadata.
cm.cm_sectype_params_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_sectype_params.
cm.cm_status_map: Maps internal OMEGA status codes to the external status codes shown to specific counterparty types.
cm.cm_status_map_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_status_map.
cm.cm_subtype_params_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_subtype_params.
cm.cm_system_params: Stores OMEGA's system-wide key-value configuration parameters — primarily execution timings, offsets, and buffer thresholds for automated Issuance, Auction, SSB, and Syndication workflows.
cm.cm_system_params_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_system_params.
cm.cm_tenor_params_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_tenor_params.
cm.cm_user_role_group_assign: Assigns each internal user to one or more role groups, controlling the user's permissions in OMEGA.
cm.cm_user_role_group_assign_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_user_role_group_assign.
cm.cm_user_tbl: Stores the master record of OMEGA users (internal MAS staff and external counterparty users), linked to IAM and the parent counterparty.
cm.cm_user_tbl_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_user_tbl.
cm.cm_applicant_submission_group_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of cm_applicant_submission_group.
iss.iss_announcement_details: Stores the announcement details of upcoming issuances, acting as the source data for announcement publication on the MAS website.
iss.iss_announcement_details_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_announcement_details.
iss.iss_announcement_stepup_rates: Stores the announced step-up coupon rates per year for SSB issuance announcements.
iss.iss_announcement_stepup_rates_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_announcement_stepup_rates.
iss.iss_auction_run: Stores the execution parameters and outcomes for a non-SSB Uniform Price Auction run.
iss.iss_auction_run_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_auction_run.
iss.iss_auction_safeguard: Stores the configured safeguard configurations for Uniform Price Auctions.
iss.iss_auction_safeguard_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_auction_safeguard.
iss.iss_bid_institutional: Stores all institutional competitive and non-competitive bids submitted by Primary Dealers (PDs) and institutions for an auction.
iss.iss_bid_institutional_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_bid_institutional.
iss.iss_bid_retail: Stores the retail applications submitted by individual investors for SGS Bonds and T-Bills via FI banks/CDP. Excludes MAS Bills and CMTBs (institutional-only) and SSBs (handled via iss.iss_sb_subscription).
iss.iss_bid_retail_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_bid_retail.
iss.iss_bid_submission_end_mapping: Stores the mapping that links a bid window extension request to the specific auction issuances affected by the extension.
iss.iss_bid_submission_end_mapping_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_bid_submission_end_mapping.
iss.iss_bid_submission_end_time: Stores the proposed new closing times, justifications, and workflow statuses for bid submission window extension requests.
iss.iss_bid_submission_end_time_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_bid_submission_end_time.
iss.iss_bid_submission_group: Stores the bid submission groups (batches) that aggregate individual bids submitted by a Primary Dealer or bank for a given issuance, tracked through the maker-checker workflow.
iss.iss_bid_submission_group_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_bid_submission_group.
iss.iss_calendar_data: Stores the issuance calendar details for every individual issuance planned within a calendar period.
iss.iss_calendar_data_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_calendar_data.
iss.iss_calendar_listing: Stores the header information of an issuance calendar.
iss.iss_calendar_listing_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_calendar_listing.
iss.iss_issuance: Stores single source of truth for issuance-level details of a security.
iss.iss_issuance_stepup_rates: Stores the verified step-up coupon rates details for SSB issuances.
iss.iss_issuance_stepup_rates_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_issuance_stepup_rates.
iss.iss_issuance_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_issuance.
iss.iss_participating_dealers: Stores the mapping of authorized Primary Dealers permitted to submit bids for a specific announcement.
iss.iss_participating_dealers_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_participating_dealers.
iss.iss_sb_allotment_run: Stores the execution parameters and outcomes for a SSB Quantity Ceiling allotment run.
iss.iss_sb_allotment_run_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_sb_allotment_run.
iss.iss_sb_applicant: Stores the SSB retail applicant identity profiles, capturing NRIC/passport, name, and nationality for Singapore Savings Bond subscriptions.
iss.iss_sb_applicant_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_sb_applicant.
iss.iss_sb_holdings: Stores the current Singapore Savings Bond holdings of retail investors.
iss.iss_sb_holdings_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_sb_holdings.
iss.iss_sb_redemption: Stores the individual SSB redemption requests submitted by retail applicants through their banks.
iss.iss_sb_redemption_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_sb_redemption.
iss.iss_sb_subscription: Stores the retail applications submitted by individual investors specifically for SSB.
iss.iss_sb_subscription_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_sb_subscription.
iss.iss_security_master: Stores the master security definitions for issued securities, capturing identification (codes, ISIN), classification, and coupon/tender attributes.
iss.iss_security_master_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_security_master.
iss.iss_synd_allotment_run: Stores the syndication allotment run executions, tracking applied/allotted amounts across public offer and placement tranches.
iss.iss_synd_allotment_run_t: Stores the transactional/history audit data of iss_synd_allotment_run.
stg.stg_agd_out_it030048: Outbound staging table that holds the scheduled security master data sent to AGD (IT030048.txt).
stg.stg_agd_out_it032048: Outbound staging table that holds the ad-hoc security master data sent to AGD (IT032048.txt).
stg.stg_agd_out_it040048: Outbound staging table that holds the scheduled securities transaction data sent to AGD (IT040048.txt).
stg.stg_agd_out_it042048: Outbound staging table that holds the ad-hoc securities transaction data sent to AGD (IT042048.txt).
stg.stg_agd_out_it050048: Outbound staging table that holds the scheduled ERF data sent to AGD (IT050048.txt). Designated for implementation in Release 2.
stg.stg_agd_out_it052048: Outbound staging table that holds the ad-hoc ERF data sent to AGD (IT052048.txt). Designated for implementation in Release 2.
stg.stg_eapps_in_closingprice: Incoming staging table that stores the daily closing yields and prices received from eApps — used for SSB step-up coupon rate calculation and routed through to MEPS+ (closingprice.txt).
stg.stg_eapps_out_secupdt: Outbound staging table that provides eApps with post-allotment security updates — total nominal amount, yields, and prices (secupdt_eapps.txt).
stg.stg_fi_in_ea_ap: Incoming staging table that stores the daily retail subscription requests for SGS Bonds and T-Bills received from retail banks (ea_[acronym]_ap1.txt for CASH, _ap2.txt for CPFIS, _ap3.txt for SRS).
stg.stg_fi_in_sb_ap: Incoming staging table that stores the daily retail subscription requests for Singapore Savings Bonds received from retail banks (sb_[acronym]_ap1.txt for CASH, sb_[acronym]_ap3.txt for SRS).
stg.stg_fi_in_sb_hol: Incoming staging table that stores the daily SSB retail holdings — CDP provides a consolidated CASH file from all retail banks; each retail bank provides its own SRS file (sb_[acronym]_hol1.txt for CASH, sb_[acronym]_hol3.txt for SRS).
stg.stg_fi_in_sb_re: Incoming staging table that stores the daily SSB redemption requests — CDP provides a consolidated CASH file from all retail banks; each retail bank provides its own SRS file (sb_[acronym]_re1.txt for CASH, sb_[acronym]_re3.txt for SRS).
stg.stg_fi_out_cal: Outbound staging table that holds the issuance calendar details for upcoming SSB, SGS Bond, and T-Bill issuances with retail participation sent to CDP and retail banks (sb_[acronym]_cal.txt, sg_[acronym]_cal.txt, tb_[acronym]_cal.txt).
stg.stg_fi_out_ea_aa: Outbound staging table that holds the acknowledgement records for SGS Bond and T-Bill retail subscription applications sent to retail banks (ea_[acronym]_aa1/aa2/aa3.txt).
stg.stg_fi_out_ea_ra: Outbound staging table that holds the retail auction results for SGS Bonds and T-Bills sent to retail banks (ea_[acronym]_ra1/ra2/ra3.txt).
stg.stg_fi_out_es_ra: Outbound staging table that holds the retail syndication results for SGS Bonds sent to retail banks (es_[acronym]_ra1/ra2/ra3.txt).
stg.stg_fi_out_ins_ea_ra: Outbound staging table that holds the institutional auction results for SGS Bonds, T-Bills, CMTBs, and MAS Bills sent to Primary Dealers (ins_ea_[bankcode]_ra1.csv).
stg.stg_fi_out_sb_aa: Outbound staging table that holds the acknowledgement records for SSB retail subscription applications sent to retail banks (sb_[acronym]_aa1.txt for CASH, sb_[acronym]_aa3.txt for SRS).
stg.stg_fi_out_sb_ah: Outbound staging table that holds the acknowledgement records for SSB retail holdings sent to CDP and retail banks (sb_[acronym]_ah1.txt for CASH, sb_[acronym]_ah3.txt for SRS).
stg.stg_fi_out_sb_ar: Outbound staging table that holds the acknowledgement records for SSB retail redemption applications sent to CDP and retail banks (sb_[acronym]_ar1.txt for CASH, sb_[acronym]_ar3.txt for SRS).
stg.stg_fi_out_sb_cpn: Outbound staging table that holds the monthly SSB coupon and redemption rates for all active SSB issues sent to CDP and retail banks (sb_[acronym]_cpn.txt).
stg.stg_fi_out_sb_ra: Outbound staging table that holds the retail allotment results for Singapore Savings Bonds sent to retail banks and CDP (sb_[acronym]_ra1.txt for CASH, sb_[acronym]_ra3.txt for SRS).
stg.stg_fi_out_sb_rr: Outbound staging table that holds the monthly SSB retail redemption results sent to CDP and retail banks (sb_[acronym]_rr1.txt for CASH, sb_[acronym]_rr3.txt for SRS).
stg.stg_fmbs_out_auction: Outbound staging table that holds the consolidated auction or syndication results for bids allotted to MAS sent to FMBS (auction_fmbs.txt).
stg.stg_fmbs_out_closingprice: Outbound staging table that holds the consolidated daily security closing yields and prices sent to FMBS (closingprice_fmbs.txt). Designated for implementation in Release 2.
stg.stg_fmbs_out_erf: Outbound staging table that holds the Enhanced Repo Facility (ERF) results sent to FMBS (fmbs_erf.txt). Designated for implementation in Release 2.
stg.stg_fmbs_out_erf_agg_bids: Outbound staging table that holds the aggregated Enhanced Repo Facility (ERF) bid results sent to FMBS (fmbs_erf_agg_bids.csv). Designated for implementation in Release 2.
stg.stg_fmbs_out_secupdt: Outbound staging table that provides FMBS with post-allotment security updates — total nominal amount, yields, and prices (secupdt_fmbs.txt). Same format as the MEPS+ feed.
stg.stg_meps_in_bank: Incoming staging table that holds the daily MEPS+ member list used to validate settlement bank information during bid collation (bank.txt).
stg.stg_meps_in_couponrates: Incoming staging table that holds the SSB step-up coupon rates received from MEPS+ before validation against OMEGA's announcement data (couponrates_sbond.txt).
stg.stg_meps_in_secint: Incoming staging table that holds the raw text parsed from the MEPS+ Daily Securities Update File (secint.txt).
stg.stg_meps_in_secmast: Incoming staging table that holds the raw text parsed from the MEPS+ New Issuance / Reopening of Securities File (secmast.txt).
stg.stg_meps_out_auction: Outbound staging table that holds the consolidated auction or syndication results aggregated by settlement bank sent to MEPS+ (auction.txt).
stg.stg_meps_out_auction_sbond: Outbound staging table that holds the consolidated SSB allotment results aggregated by settlement bank and result category sent to MEPS+ (auction_sbond.txt).
stg.stg_meps_out_closingprice: Outbound staging table that holds the consolidated daily security closing yields and prices received from eApps, routed through to MEPS+ (closingprice.txt).
stg.stg_meps_out_rdmpartial_sbond: Outbound staging table that provides MEPS+ with the consolidated SSB partial redemption results (CASH and SRS combined per issue code) before the redemption date (rdmpartial_sbond.txt).
stg.stg_meps_out_secupdt: Outbound staging table that provides MEPS+ with post-allotment security updates — total nominal amount, yields, and prices (secupdt.txt).
